html:
Exclusive to:

Tab Icon.

The Shelves Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. All Shelves provide six inventory slots; each slot can only fit one item.

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be acquired in the Shelves Tab:

Name Recipe Description Spawn Code

Carved Bookshelf		 ×2 "A staple for bookworms." shelves_wood

Basic Bookshelf		 ×2 "A basic bookshelf for basic books." shelves_basic

Cinderblock Bookshelf		 ×1 "Dormitory approved." shelves_cinderblocks

Marble Shelf		 ×8 "Classic, yet avant-garde." shelves_marble

Windowed Cabinet		 ×6 "Elegantly curved." shelves_midcentury

Glass Shelf		 ×8 "Breakable yet practical." shelves_glass

Ladder Shelf		 ×8 "Use it to reach the high shelf." shelves_ladder

Hutch Shelf		 ×8 "A place for things." shelves_hutch

Industrial Shelf		 ×8 "Practical storage." shelves_industrial

Adjustable Shelf		 ×8 "Flexible furnishings." shelves_adjustable

Wall Mounted Shelf		 ×6 "Nailed it." shelves_wallmount

A-Frame Shelf		 ×6 "A+ shelving." shelves_aframe

Crates Shelf		 ×6 "Wholesale chic." shelves_crates

Fridge		 ×6 "Cool." shelves_fridge

Floating Shelf		 ×6 "Try a different angle." shelves_floating

Pipe Shelf		 ×6 "Plumb the depths of this shelving." shelves_pipe

Hat Tree		 ×6 "Not actually a tree." shelves_hattree

Pallet Shelf		 ×6 "Barely palatable." shelves_pallet
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Tab Icon.
The Shelves Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. All Shelves provide six inventory slots; each slot can only fit one item.
Craftable Items and Structures[edit | edit source]
The following items and structures can be acquired in the Shelves Tab:
Name
Recipe
Description
Spawn Code
Carved Bookshelf
×2
"A staple for bookworms."

“Pointless.”

“EXTERNAL HARD DRIVE”
–WX-78, when examining a Carved Bookshelf
“My books could fill this up.”

“Nice wood grain.”

“Ah. A place to put my books.”

“Sensible.”

“Its uses are plentiful!”

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thẻ Kệ là một hạng mục chế tạo dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Tab Đổi mới. Tất cả các Giá đều cung cấp sáu ô chứa đồ; mỗi khe chỉ có thể chứa một vật phẩm.
title: Shelves Tab
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Hamlet}} [[File:Shelves.png|thumb|104x104px|Tab Icon.]] The '''Shelves Tab''' is a crafting category exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found under the [[Renovate Tab]]. All Shelves provide six inventory slots; each slot can only fit one item. == Craftable Items and Structures == The following items and structures can be acquired in the Shelves Tab: {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" |- ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Name ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Recipe ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Description ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Spawn Code |- | [[File:Carved Bookshelf.png|32px]]
Carved Bookshelf || [[File:Oinc.png|32px|link=Oinc]]×2 || ''"A staple for bookworms."'' || shelves_wood |- |colspan="4"| {{Quotes |wilson = A place to put stuff. |willow = Might be flammable. |wolfgang = Wolfgang build better. |wendy = Pointless. |wx78 = EXTERNAL HARD DRIVE |wickerbottom = My books could fill this up. |woodie = Nice wood grain. |maxwell = Ah. A place to put my books. |wagstaff = Sensible. |wigfrid = Its uses are plentiful! |webber = We could put stuff on there! |walani = I can put my stuff on there. |warly = A place to put cooking instruments. |woodlegs = Fer the keepin' of me booty. |wilba = 'TIS A HOLDY THING |wormwood = Helping friends |wheeler = Storage space! |choose = wilson |source = when examining a Carved Bookshelf }} |- |colspan="4"|[[File:Carved Bookshelf Build.png|300px]] |- | [[File:Basic Bookshelf.png|32px]]
Basic Bookshelf || [[File:Oinc.png|32px|link=Oinc]]×2 || ''"A basic bookshelf for basic books."'' || shelves_basic |- |colspan="4"| {{Quotes |wilson = Basic. |willow = Blah. |wolfgang = Is place for stuff putting. |wendy = Pointless. |wx78 = EXTERNAL HARD DRIVE |wickerbottom = My books could be put into there. |woodie = Nice wood grain. |maxwell = A bit basic, but it'll do. |wagstaff = Functional. |wigfrid = Things may be put ön thee! |webber = We can put stuff on here. |walani = A place to put my stuff. |warly = Palatable. |woodlegs = Fer th'keepin' o' me booty. |wilba = 'TIS A HOLDY THING O' TREE STUFFS |wormwood = For stuff |wheeler = Keeps my things off the ground. |choose = maxwell |source = when examining a Basic Bookshelf }} |- |colspan="4"|[[File:Basic Bookshelf Build.png|300px]] |- | [[File:Cinderblock Bookshelf.png|32px]]
Cinderblock Bookshelf || [[File:Oinc.png|32px|link=Oinc]]×1 || ''"Dormitory approved."'' || shelves_cinderblocks |- |colspan="4"| {{Quotes |wilson = It could use some work. |willow = Can't even set this on fire. |wolfgang = Wolfgang not fancy. |wendy = Pointless and ugly. |wx78 = EXTERNAL HARD DRIVE IN NEED OF AN UPGRADE |wickerbottom = I could put my books there. |woodie = Nothing too fancy for us, eh Lucy? |maxwell = Interesting choice of decor. |wagstaff = Functional. |wigfrid = I could cleave these röcks in twö! |webber = We could put stuff on there! |walani = I have this in my place at home. |warly = Tasteless. |woodlegs = In need o' repairs. |wilba = IT HOLD-ETH STUFFS, METHINKS |wormwood = For stuff |wheeler = Keeps my things off the floor. |choose = woodie |source = when examining a Cinderblock Bookshelf }} |- |colspan="4"|[[File:Cinderblock Bookshelf Build.png|300px]] |- | [[File:Marble Shelf.png|32px]]
Marble Shelf || [[File:Oinc.png|32px|link=Oinc]]×8 || ''"Classic, yet avant-garde."'' || shelves_marble |- |colspan="4"| {{Quotes |wilson = A place to put stuff. |willow = Marble isn't flammable. |wolfgang = Is fancy place for stuff putting. |wendy = Pointless. |wx78 = EXTERNAL HARD DRIVE |wickerbottom = My books could fill this up. |woodie = I like the wood ones better. |maxwell = I have the perfect book for that bookshelf. |wagstaff = Ornamental. |wigfrid = Its uses are plentiful! |webber = This one's super pretty. |walani = Fancy place to put stuff. |warly = A exquisite place for cookbooks. |woodlegs = Fer the keepin' of me booty. |wilba = 'TIS FANCY HOLDY THING |wormwood = For stuff |wheeler = Desperately needed storage space. |choose = warly |source = when examining a Marble Shelf }} |- |colspan="4"|[[File:Marble Shelf build.png|300px]] |- | [[File:Windowed Cabinet.png|32px]]

A place to put my books. |wagstaff = Concave. |wigfrid = Things may be put ön thee! |webber = This one's super pretty. |walani = A fancy place to put stuff. |warly = Luscious. |woodlegs = Fer the keepin' of me booty. |wilba = 'TIS A HOLDY THING |wormwood = For stuff |wheeler = Storage space. |choose = wagstaff |source = when examining a Windowed Cabinet }} |- |colspan="4"|[[File:Windowed Cabinet Build.png|300px]] |- | [[File:Glass Shelf.png|32px]]

Ladder Shelf || [[File:Oinc.png|32px|link=Oinc]]×8 || ''"Use it to reach the high shelf."'' || shelves_ladder |- |colspan="4"| {{Quotes |wilson = Nice use for a ladder. |willow = Ugly. |wolfgang = Wolfgang build better. |wendy = Pointless and ugly. |wx78 = EXTERNAL HARD DRIVE |wickerbottom = My books could fill this up. |woodie = Nice use of a ladder. |maxwell = Boorish. |wagstaff = Practical. |wigfrid = Its uses are plentiful! |webber = We could put stuff on there! |walani = I can put my stuff on there. |warly = Mellow. |woodlegs = Fer the keepin' of me booty. |wilba = 'TIS HOLDY THING MADE O' CLIMBY THING |wormwood = For stuff |wheeler = Keeps my things off the floor. |choose = wilson |source = when examining a Ladder Shelf }} |- |colspan="4"|[[File:Ladder Shelf Build.png|300px]] |- | [[File:Hutch Shelf.png|32px]]

A place to put my books. |wagstaff = Elaborate. |wigfrid = Its uses are plentiful! |webber = We could put stuff on there! |walani = Fancy place to put stuff. |warly = Tasteful. |woodlegs = Fer the keepin' of me booty. |wilba = 'TIS HOLDY THING |wormwood = For stuff |wheeler = Storage space! |choose = wheeler |source = when examining a Hutch Shelf }} |- |colspan="4"|[[File:Hutch Shelf Build.png|300px]] |- | [[File:Industrial Shelf.png|32px]]

Fridge || [[File:Oinc.png|32px|link=Oinc]]×6 || ''"Cool."'' || shelves_fridge |- |colspan="4"| {{Quotes |wilson = This doesn't make sense. |willow = Is this a fridge, or... |wolfgang = Is fancy place for stuff putting. |wendy = Pointless and confusing. |wx78 = DISGUISED EXTERNAL HARD DRIVE |wickerbottom = I'm quite confused as to what this is. |woodie = Is this a fridge or a shelf? |maxwell = Interesting choice of decor. |wagstaff = Deceptive. |wigfrid = What manner öf furniture is this?! |webber = Um... is this a shelf or a fridge? |walani = Reduce, reuse, recycle. |warly = I like this one very much. |woodlegs = 'Tis no shelf that I've ever seen. |wilba = WHATFORE CAN'ST IT HOLD? |wormwood = For stuff |wheeler = What it lacks in freezing power it gains in storage space. |choose = woodlegs |source = when examining a Fridge }} |- |colspan="4"|[[File:Fridge Build.png|300px]] |- | [[File:Floating Shelf.png|32px]]
